diagrams.title: Cyclic Shift Representation
diagrams.description: Shows how cyclic shift works on codeword 1011 of length 4
diagrams.purpose: Visualize cyclic property: any rotation gives valid codeword

diagrams.title: Cyclic Encoder using LFSR
diagrams.description: Hardware circuit for encoding with generator polynomial g(x)
diagrams.purpose: Understand efficient hardware implementation of cyclic codes

diagrams.title: Syndrome Computation Circuit
diagrams.description: Circuit to compute syndrome from received word
elements: Syndrome output after all bits processed
diagrams.purpose: Learn how errors are detected using parity check polynomial

diagrams.title: Generator Matrix Formation
diagrams.description: Shows how generator matrix rows are cyclic shifts of g(x) coefficients
diagrams.purpose: Visualize construction of generator matrix from polynomial

diagrams.title: Polynomial Division Process
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step polynomial long division for encoding
diagrams.purpose: Understand systematic encoding process step by step
